landing.heroSubtitle: A VEXA Ecosystem where learning, networking, company engagement, and career opportunities are all interconnected in one system.
landing.cycle: Learn → Build → Connect → Showcase → Get Opportunities
landing.problemTitle: Tech growth is broken and fragmented.
landing.problemDesc: Your tech journey is scattered across disjointed platforms. No continuity, no shared progress, and talent remains invisible.
landing.ctaTitle: The future of tech is connected.
landing.ctaDesc: This platform creates a closed-loop ecosystem for tech growth. It removes fragmentation and replaces it with a single structured system that connects education, community, companies, and employment.

feed.title: Home Feed
feed.subtitle: Share insights, projects, and updates with the ecosystem.
feed.placeholder: Share a project, an insight, or a question...
feed.tipDesc: Connect your GitHub to automatically sync your latest contributions. Verified builds increase visibility by 4x.

learning.title: Learning Paths
learning.subtitle: Structured, industry-vetted roadmaps. Every lesson you complete is verified and added to your professional proof-of-skill profile.
learning.certDesc: Get official certifications from companies like Google, AWS, and Meta directly through our Company Hub integration.

network.title: Tech Network
network.subtitle: Discover professionals by verified skills, not self-declared titles.
network.filterPlaceholder: Filter by skill, role, or location...

companies.title: Connect with Global Tech Leaders
companies.subtitle: Verified company pages for recruitment, official training programs, and industry-recognized certifications.

opportunities.title: Opportunity Discovery
opportunities.subtitle: Personalized matches based on your verified skill proof activity.
